---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for HireFlow AI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Please describe the current behavior and how this feature would improve it.

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Please provide a detailed description of the proposed functionality.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or features did you consider? Why did you choose this approach?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.

## Use Cases

Describe specific use cases where this feature would be beneficial:

1. Use case 1
2. Use case 2
3. Use case 3

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Must have
- [ ] High - Important
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Would be helpful

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas on how to implement this feature, please share them here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the problem this solves
- [ ] I have described how this feature should work
